title: aconiopteris subdiaphana
intro: Aconiopteris subdiaphana is an extinct plant species, part of the family of ferns, with its fossil remains found in the Jurassic period. The plant is known to have been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Aconiopteris subdiaphana are thought to be related to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, although there is limited information on its specific health benefits. Unfortunately, due to the plant's extinction, there are no recorded herbal preparations or modern uses of Aconiopteris subdiaphana.
